message:
fix(cli,cm,ensemble,serve): harden error handling for json.Marshal and file stat calls

ensemble_presets.go: use os.Stat(outputPath) after file close instead
of f.Stat() on a closed file descriptor (undefined behavior in Go).

cm/client.go: propagate json.Marshal error in RecordOutcome instead
of silently discarding it with a blank identifier.

ensemble/context_cache.go: add fallback cache key path when
json.Marshal fails on ContextFingerprint — falls back to a
field-concatenated string hashed with SHA-256. Add test for the
fallback key material format.

serve/server.go: check json.Marshal errors in three SSE event paths
in handleAttentionStreamV1 (cursor-expired, connected, heartbeat)
and log + return instead of writing corrupt JSON to the stream.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
